The classification of Basilima pygmaea places it within the order Gentianales. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Further classification includes Basilima pygmaea being part of the Rubiaceae family, but the family has undergone changes in classification and is still being studied by botanists.
